lab_03_benchmarks.description: Missing information regarding time, user, or duration.
lab_03_benchmarks.input: Set up a meeting for me.
lab_03_benchmarks.expected_behavior: The Agent must recognize the missing information and ask clarifying questions instead of attempting to call the tool with empty or fabricated data (preventing Hallucination Error).

lab_03_benchmarks.description: User inputs terms or platforms outside the supported scope (e.g., Slack, Zoom).
lab_03_benchmarks.input: /date-book 'Bao' @10 AM tomorrow on Slack and send a message via Zalo.
lab_03_benchmarks.expected_behavior: The Agent must inform the user that it currently only supports Google Calendar and cannot perform actions on Slack or Zalo.

lab_03_benchmarks.description: User enters tasks outside the tool's capabilities (e.g., ordering food, booking flights).
lab_03_benchmarks.input: /date-book 'Bao' @3 PM today, and also please order 2 milk teas to be delivered to the meeting room.
lab_03_benchmarks.expected_behavior: The Agent should proceed with the calendar booking but politely decline the milk tea order, explaining that it lacks the corresponding tool.
